creator: thompsa@FreeBSD.org
text:
On my OpenStack instance I am seeing 

Shared object "libpython2.7.so.1" not found, required by "python2.7"

when it is running /usr/local/etc/rc.d/cloudinit. From the rcorder below we can see ldconfig is running after cloudinit. This is ZFS which may affect the ordering.
The patch below resolves it.


--- cloudinit.orig	2014-10-11 04:26:25.000000000 +1300
+++ cloudinit	2017-12-15 22:16:23.550246050 +1300
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/bin/sh
 
 # PROVIDE: cloudinit
-# REQUIRE: FILESYSTEMS NETWORKING cloudinitlocal
+# REQUIRE: FILESYSTEMS NETWORKING cloudinitlocal ldconfig
 # BEFORE:  cloudconfig cloudfinal
 
 . /etc/rc.subr




rcorder before

/etc/rc.d/sysctl
/etc/rc.d/hostid
/etc/rc.d/zvol
/etc/rc.d/dumpon
